'''Solistein''' was an individual who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as a [[captain/Legends|captain]] and an [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] at the time the controversial [[sentientologist]] and [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologist]] [[Obo Rin]] was writing the ''[[Catalog of Intelligent Life in the Galaxy]]'' under Vader's patronage.<ref name="Galaxy Guide" />

When [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Herrit]], an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]], disputed Obo Rin's expense reports and credentials in a message to Vader, Solistein relayed Vader's reply. Through Solistein, Vader ordered that Rin be reimbursed and allowed to continue his work. Vader and Solistein did not address Herrit's criticism of Rin's qualifications in detail, though Solistein did claim that Vader had visited [[Sab Rufo]] (a planet where Rin claimed to have been educated, and which Herrit believed did not exist.)<ref name="Galaxy Guide" />

Vader also had Solistein tell Herrit to personally obtain a [[Duinuogwuin/Legends|Duinuogwuin]] corpse for Rin to dissect, a mission which Herrit did not survive.<ref name="Galaxy Guide" />
